span.p:
Flywheel AT_SETPOINT
AND Hood AT_SETPOINT
AND drivetrain aligned
AND target shootable

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Flywheel UNDER_SHOOTING
OR hood loses position
OR alignment lost
OR target not shootable

span.p:
All shooter subsystems stopped
Flywheel → IDLE
Hood → IDLE
FlywheelKicker → IDLE

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Passive shooter mode (DEFAULT)
Flywheel → IDLE (spun down)
Hood → DUCKED
FlywheelKicker → IDLE

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Spinning up and aiming
Flywheel → SHOOTING (ramping up)
Hood → AIMING (moving to angle)
FlywheelKicker → KICKING (WoodBot: IDLE)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Ready and firing
Flywheel → SHOOTING (at setpoint)
Hood → AIMING (at setpoint)
FlywheelKicker → KICKING
Stays in FIRING through brief RPM dips
(RECOVERING state in flywheel)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Reversing to clear jams
Flywheel → IDLE
Hood → IDLE
FlywheelKicker → REVERSING
